payload.title: work:Turn Order List
payload.text: Circular list of players in clockwise order. Start player is head. Cycled each turn: pop head, push to tail (or use index + modulo). On Queen claim, the list drives who still gets a normal turn, then who gets a roll-off turn. Players mathematically eliminated from roll-off are skipped.

payload.title: work:Current Player
payload.text: Pointer/index into Turn Order List. Updated by Advance to Next Player. Code: GameState.currentPlayer.

payload.title: work:Start Player
payload.text: Tracks who has the Start Player tile. Does not change during the game. Used for tie-breaking in roll-off and determining round boundaries.

payload.title: work:Game Phase
payload.text: Enum: Setup, Playing, RollOff, GameOver. Transitions: Setup -> Playing (after setup), Playing -> RollOff (on Queen claim + round complete), RollOff -> GameOver (after all roll-off turns + Queen's last chance).

payload.title: work:Pharaoh Token
payload.text: Tracks which player holds the Pharaoh. Null during Playing phase. Set to Queen claimer on claim. Can transfer during roll-off turns when a player matches or exceeds the current high score.

payload.title: work:Pharaoh Target Score
payload.text: The locked dice pip total to beat. Set when Queen is claimed. Updated each time the Pharaoh token transfers to a new holder.

payload.title: work:Round Number
payload.text: Incremented each time the turn cycles back to start player. Used to track which players haven't had a turn "this round" for compensation tokens on Queen claim.

fields.title: Players Who Have Taken a Turn This Round

payload.title: work:Players Who Have Taken a Turn This Round
payload.text: Set of player IDs. Cleared at start of each round. Used to determine who gets +1 die token compensation when Queen is claimed mid-round.

payload.title: work:Level Bars
payload.text: List of 5 level bars (levels 3-7). Each bar has an A side and B side defining the dice criteria. The active side is chosen during setup and fixed for the game.

payload.title: work:Bar Slots
payload.text: Each level bar has multiple slots. Each slot holds criteria (from the bar) and a tile stack. Number of slots per bar varies by level. Code: BarDatabase, BarSlot, BarStrip.

payload.title: work:Tile Stacks (per slot)
payload.text: Stack (LIFO) of tiles at each bar slot. Depth = num_players - 1. Top tile is visible and claimable. When empty, slot is exhausted. Three colors per level: yellow (populace), blue (priesthood), red (artifact). Code: TileShop, TileSlot.

payload.title: work:Claimable Tiles (derived)
payload.text: Computed each Claim Phase from the current player's locked dice. For each non-empty tile stack, check if locked dice satisfy that slot's criteria AND player doesn't already own same-color tile at that level. This is a derived/filtered view, not stored permanently. Code: PurchaseCriteria subclasses evaluate this.

payload.title: work:Reroll Token Pool
payload.text: 31 reroll tokens. Decremented when a player gains one, returned when spent.

payload.title: work:+1 Pip Token Pool
payload.text: 31 pip tokens. Decremented when gained, returned when spent.

payload.title: work:+1 Die Token Pool
payload.text: 3 die tokens. Very scarce. Decremented when gained, returned when spent.

payload.title: work:Owned Tiles List
payload.text: All tiles this player has claimed. Grows over the game, never shrinks. Subdivided by color for the "can't claim same color at same level" rule. Code: PlayerBoard.tileList.

payload.title: work:Owned Yellow Tiles (Populace)
payload.text: Subset of owned tiles. Yellow tiles are permanent passive/triggered abilities. Used to check claiming restrictions (one yellow per level).

payload.title: work:Owned Blue Tiles (Priesthood)
payload.text: Subset of owned tiles. Blue tiles are permanent abilities, often stronger versions of yellow. One blue per level restriction.

payload.title: work:Owned Red Tiles (Artifacts)
payload.text: Subset of owned tiles. Red tiles are one-time-use artifacts. Each has an isArtifactUsed flag. Once used, flipped face-down permanently.

payload.title: work:Player Dice Pool
payload.text: All dice this player owns. Starts with 3 standard (red). Grows as tiles grant bonus dice (Serf, Noble Adoption, Conspirator, etc). Persistent across turns â€” the dice themselves are permanent, only their location (cup/active/locked) changes per turn. Code: PlayerBoard.diceList.

payload.title: work:Player Scarab Tokens
payload.text: Tokens this player holds. Three types: reroll, pip, die. Gained by not claiming a tile (2 tokens) or from tile abilities (Beggar). Spent during Scarab Phase. Code: PlayerBoard.scarabList.

payload.title: work:Player Pyramid (Locked Dice Display)
payload.text: Visual arrangement of locked dice. Dice are placed into pyramid slots as they're locked. The pyramid total (sum of pip values) determines the score for claiming and roll-off. Only dice with standard numeric pip values count toward the total.

payload.title: work:Bonus Dice Sources (derived)
payload.text: Derived from owned tiles at Start of Turn. Lists which extra dice to add to cup: Serf->orange, Noble Adoption->yellow, Conspirator->green, Ship Captain->black, Grand Vizier->purple, Palace Key->+2 standard (artifact), Palace Servants->+1 white, Charioteer->+1 white +1 standard, Royal Attendants->+2 standard +1 white, General->+3 standard, Heir->+2 standard +1 white, Granary Master->+1 standard.

payload.title: work:Owned Tiles by Level (derived)
payload.text: Indexed view of owned tiles grouped by level (3-7) and color. Used to enforce claiming restriction: cannot claim a tile at a level where you already own a tile of that color.

payload.title: work:Dice in Cup
payload.text: Dice available to roll. At turn start: player's permanent dice + bonus dice from tiles. Shrinks as dice are locked. When empty, rolling is impossible. Code: GameState zone InCupArea.

payload.title: work:Active Dice (Rolled, Unlocked)
payload.text: Dice that have been rolled but not yet locked. Player interacts with these: locking, using scarabs, using tile abilities. After locking, dice move from here to Locked Dice. Code: GameState zone ActiveArea.

payload.title: work:Locked Dice (In Pyramid)
payload.text: Dice locked into the pyramid this turn. Ordered by lock sequence. Once locked, cannot be unlocked (except by specific rare abilities). Their pip values are checked against level bar criteria. Code: GameState zone LockedArea.

payload.title: work:Set Dice (Fixed Value)
payload.text: Dice whose values have been set by abilities (Tomb Builder, Astrologer, etc). These have isSetDie = true. They bypass normal rolling. Code: GameState zone SetDiceArea.

payload.title: work:Temporary Dice
payload.text: Dice added during the turn from +1 Die tokens or tile abilities. Flagged bIsTemporary = true. Destroyed at End of Turn.

payload.title: work:Available Tile Abilities
payload.text: List of tile abilities that can still be activated this turn. Populated from owned tiles at Start of Turn. Abilities are removed (or marked used) when activated. Artifacts are removed permanently after use. Code: TileAbility.isUsedThisTurn flag.

payload.title: work:Used Abilities This Turn
payload.text: Tracks which abilities have been used this turn. Prevents double activation of once-per-turn abilities (Astrologer, etc). Cleared at Start of Turn. Code: TileAbility.isUsedThisTurn.

payload.title: work:Dice Locked This Roll Counter
payload.text: Must be >= 1 before player can roll again. Reset to 0 at start of each roll. Incremented when a die is locked. Code: PlayerGameState.diceLockedThisTurn.

payload.title: work:Roll Number
payload.text: Which roll the player is on (1st, 2nd, 3rd, ...). Some abilities are first-roll-only (Farmer, Worker, Soldier, Soothsayer). Some are first-and-second (Artisan). Incremented after each roll.

payload.title: work:Turn Phase State Machine
payload.text: The PlayerGameState enum: InitTurn -> ReadyToRollDice -> DiceHaveBeenRolled -> WaitingForLock -> (loop back or) -> WaitingForPurchaseTile -> TilePurchaseChosen -> EndTurn -> WaitingNextTurn. Code: PlayerGameState.SetState().

payload.title: work:Used Abilities This Roll
payload.text: Abilities that fire once per roll (not once per turn). Reset when a new roll begins. Code: TileAbility.isUsedThisRoll.

payload.title: work:Dice Locked This Roll
payload.text: Subset of locked dice that were locked during THIS roll specifically. Must be non-empty before player can roll again. Used for LockedAny trigger (Herder checks if a pair was locked this roll).

payload.title: work:Custom Dice Abilities Pending
payload.text: When custom dice land on special faces (Artisan *, Intrigue **, Voyage R/DD/L/*, Decree *), their abilities queue here for the player to resolve before continuing. Player chooses order and targets for each pending ability.

fields.title: Stored Die State (Estate Overseer / Granary Master)

payload.title: work:Stored Die State (Estate Overseer / Granary Master)
payload.text: Tracks the value of dice stored on tiles that increment each roll. After each roll, player may bring the stored die into play (consume it) or leave it to increment by 1. Resets to 1 at Start of Turn.

payload.title: work:Trigger Registry
payload.text: Maps trigger types to lists of abilities that listen for them. Rebuilt when player gains a tile. Trigger types: StartOfTurn, EndOfTurn, StartOfRoll (AfterRoll), AllLocked, Acquire, AcquireUndo, Select, ChooseDie, LockedAny, OnSpecificRoll. Code: TileAbility.triggerType + PlayerBoard.FireTriggers().

payload.title: work:Die Type Filters
payload.text: Each ability specifies which dice it can target: Standard, Immediate, Custom, Active, Locked, ActiveCustomOrImmediate, Any. Filters the die selection UI when an ability is activated. Code: TileAbility.dieType enum.

payload.title: work:Artifact Usage Tracker
payload.text: Per-player list of red (artifact) tiles and their used/unused state. Once used, isArtifactUsed = true permanently. Cannot be reset. Artifacts are one-time-use per game, not per turn.

payload.title: work:Ability Delegation Pattern
payload.text: When an ability needs player input (choose a die, choose a value), it sets delegates on PlayerGameState: OnDieSelect, OnDieDone, OnDieCancel. The game enters a die-selection mode where the player clicks dice, and the delegate processes the choice. This is the core interaction pattern for all active abilities. Code: PlayerGameState.delOnDieSelect.

payload.title: work:Roll-Off Turn Order
payload.text: Starts with the player after the Queen claimer (clockwise). Each player gets exactly 1 roll-off turn. Players who mathematically cannot reach the Pharaoh score are skipped. Queen claimer goes last (Queen's Last Chance) only if someone took their Pharaoh.

payload.title: work:Eligible Players
payload.text: Players who can still potentially beat the Pharaoh score. Computed from their maximum possible dice total (num_dice * 6). Players whose max < pharaoh_score are eliminated and skipped.

payload.title: work:Completed Roll-Off Players
payload.text: Set of players who have finished their roll-off turn. When this equals rolloff-turn-order (minus skipped), the contest ends.

payload.title: work:Queen Claimer
payload.text: The player who claimed the Queen tile. Gets Queen's Last Chance if the Pharaoh was taken from them. Also used for tie-breaking: closest to Queen claimer's right wins ties.

payload.title: work:Compensation Token Recipients
payload.text: Players to the right of start player who hadn't taken a turn in the round when Queen was claimed. Each receives +1 die token. Derived from players-this-round set at the moment of Queen claim.

payload.title: work:Turn Order
payload.text: Circular SmartList of Player objects in clockwise seating order. Head = start player. The game loop iterates this list each round. During roll-off, this same list is walked but skipping eliminated players.

payload.title: work:Roll-Off Eligible Players
payload.text: SmartList of Player objects who can still compete in the roll-off. Subset of Turn Order. Players whose max possible score < Pharaoh target are removed. Same Player singletons as Turn Order.

payload.title: work:Market Stack (per bar slot)
payload.text: One SmartList per bar slot. LIFO stack of Tile objects. Top tile is claimable. When a player claims the top tile, it's popped from this stack and pushed onto the player's Owned Tiles list. When the stack is empty, the slot is exhausted. There are ~20-30 of these stacks in a game (varies by bar configuration).

payload.title: work:Player Owned Tiles
payload.text: SmartList of Tile objects this player has claimed. The same Tile singleton that was on a Market Stack. Grows over the game. Each Tile carries its child Abilities with it. Used to derive bonus dice, available abilities, and claiming restrictions.

payload.title: work:Player Owned Yellow (Populace)
payload.text: Filtered view / sub-SmartList of Player Owned Tiles containing only yellow tiles. Used for the restriction: one yellow per level.

payload.title: work:Player Owned Blue (Priesthood)
payload.text: Filtered view / sub-SmartList of Player Owned Tiles containing only blue tiles. One blue per level restriction.

payload.title: work:Player Owned Red (Artifacts)
payload.text: Filtered view / sub-SmartList of Player Owned Tiles containing only red tiles. Each has used/unused state. Destroying a used artifact removes it and cascades to its Ability children.

payload.title: work:Tile Abilities (parent-child)
payload.text: Each Tile has a SmartList of its child Ability objects. This is the ownership relationship. If the Tile is destroyed, these Abilities cascade-delete from all lists. A tile may have multiple abilities with different trigger types.

payload.title: work:Available Abilities This Turn
payload.text: SmartList of Ability objects that can be activated this turn. Populated at Start of Turn from all owned tiles' abilities. When an ability is used (once-per-turn), it's removed from this list. Same Ability singletons that live under their parent Tiles.

payload.title: work:Available Abilities This Roll
payload.text: SmartList of Ability objects that can be activated this roll. Subset of Available Abilities This Turn for once-per-roll abilities. Reset (repopulated from Available Abilities This Turn) at the start of each roll within the turn.

payload.title: work:Pending Custom Dice Abilities
payload.text: SmartList of Ability objects triggered by custom dice faces landing on special values (Artisan *, Intrigue **, Voyage faces, Decree *). Populated after a roll. Player resolves each one, removing it from the list as it's consumed.

payload.title: work:Triggered Abilities Queue
payload.text: SmartList of Ability objects that have been triggered by a game state transition (StartOfTurn, AfterRoll, LockedAny, AllLocked, Acquire, etc). Populated by FireTriggers(). Processed in order, then cleared. Same singletons as the Tile's children.

payload.title: work:Player Dice Pool
payload.text: SmartList of all Die objects this player owns. Permanent across turns. Starts with 3 standard red dice. Grows when tiles grant custom dice (Serf->orange, Noble Adoption->yellow, etc). The pool is the authoritative ownership list; zone lists are views into it.

payload.title: work:Dice in Cup
payload.text: SmartList of Die objects available to roll. At turn start, all dice from Player Dice Pool + temporary bonus dice are here. As dice are locked, they leave this list. When empty, player cannot roll.

payload.title: work:Active Dice
payload.text: SmartList of Die objects that have been rolled but not yet locked. Player interacts with these: locking, scarab use, ability targets. After locking, a die moves from Active to Locked.

payload.title: work:Locked Dice
payload.text: SmartList of Die objects locked into the pyramid. Ordered by lock sequence. Their pip values are summed for criteria checking and roll-off scoring. Only standard numeric values count.

payload.title: work:Set Dice
payload.text: SmartList of Die objects whose values have been fixed by abilities (Tomb Builder, Astrologer, etc). These bypass normal rolling. The Die singleton is on this list AND on Active or Locked.

payload.title: work:Temporary Dice
payload.text: SmartList of Die objects created during the turn from +1 Die tokens or tile abilities. These are singletons that exist only for the current turn. At End of Turn, they're destroyed â€” which cascade-removes them from Cup, Active, Locked, or wherever they ended up.

payload.title: work:Scarab Supply Pool
payload.text: Three SmartLists (one per type) holding unowned Scarab objects. When a player gains a token, the Scarab moves from here to the player's Scarab list. Finite supply: 31 reroll, 31 pip, 3 die.

payload.title: work:Player Scarabs
payload.text: SmartList of Scarab objects this player holds. When spent, the Scarab is destroyed (removed from this list). Could also return to Supply Pool if the design prefers recycling over destruction.
